name: Flexus Core 200 3.1.2 Dolby Atmos Soundbar with Built-In Subwoofers & Onkyo Tuning
descriptionHtml:
Hear Every Word. Feel Every Scene.


The Klipsch Flexus Core 200 isn’t just louder than your TV —

it transforms the way you experience movies, sports, and streaming.


Powered by Onkyo engineering and enhanced with Dolby Atmos, this 3.1.2-channel soundbar delivers cinematic clarity, immersive surround sound, and deep, room-filling bass — without needing an external subwoofer.


About this Item

  • Co-Created Excellence: Developed in collaboration with Onkyo, blending advanced audio engineering and trusted reliability for a powerful home entertainment experience.
  • Immersive 3.1.2-Channel Soundbar: Features advanced acoustics and proprietary sound technology to create a complete, cinematic surround experience.
  • Dolby Atmos Integration: Equipped with two built-in elevation speakers for multidimensional, room-filling sound that brings every scene to life.
  • Custom-Tuned Audio & Deep Bass: Features four 2.25” ceramic drivers and dual 4” built-in subwoofers for full-bodied, distortion-free bass—no external subwoofer needed.
  • Crystal-Clear Dialog Clarity: Dedicated horn-loaded tweeter ensures crisp, distinct vocals so you catch every word, from quiet conversations to explosive action scenes.
  • Designed for Real Living Rooms : Whether you’re watching a late-night drama, hosting match day, or streaming your favorite playlist — Flexus Core 200 adapts with clarity, depth, and control.


Product Details

  • Output Power: 185W of dynamic, high-performance sound.
  • Frequency Response: Deep and rich bass down to 43 Hz.
  • Connectivity: Bluetooth for seamless wireless streaming.
  • Audio Output Mode: Surround sound for an immersive experience.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, 16A, Goraguntepalya, Yeshwanthpur Industrial Suburb, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022

name: RP-600M II  Bookshelf Speakers with Titanium Tweeter, Tractrix Horn & Cerametallic Woofer
descriptionHtml:
Product Details

  • Maximum Output Power: 400 Watts for rich, dynamic sound performance.
  • Connectivity Technology: Wired for pure, uninterrupted audio transmission.
  • Audio Output Mode: Surround sound for an immersive listening experience.
  • Mounting Type: Shelf mount for versatile placement in any setup.
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, 16A, Goraguntepalya, Yeshwanthpur Industrial Suburb, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022


About this Item

  • Enhanced Tractrix Horn Design: A larger 90° x 90° silicone composite hybrid horn ensures clearer, more precise sound across all frequencies.
  • Titanium LTS Tweeter: Linear Travel Suspension (LTS) titanium diaphragm tweeter minimizes distortion, delivering crisp and detailed highs.
  • Vented Tweeter Housing: Improves sound clarity and enhances overall detail for a natural listening experience.
  • Redesigned Cerametallic Woofers: Engineered for exceptional efficiency and minimal distortion, providing flawless, balanced sound.
  • Optimized Tractrix Ports: Ensures smooth airflow and powerful, clean bass response with reduced turbulence.
  • Bi-Wiring/Bi-Amping Support: Dual input terminals allow separation of frequency currents to minimize distortion and improve audio precision.
  • Premium Build & Finish: Crafted with furniture-grade materials and finishes, these speakers are both powerful and visually stunning.
  • Magnetic Removable Grilles: Easily switch between a modern, minimalist look or a bold, exposed-cone style.
  • Included in the Box: (2) RP-600M II Bookshelf Speakers.

name: Klipsch ProMedia Lumina 2.1 Computer Gaming System with Subwoofer and RGB Lighting Effects Built-in
descriptionHtml:
Product details

  • Audio Output Mode: Surround
  • Speaker Type: Computer Speaker
  • Additional Features: LED Light
  • Speaker Size: 9.75 Inches
  • Power: 10 Watts
  • Country of Origin: China
  • Imported by: Cinerama Private Limited, 16A, Goraguntepalya, Yeshwanthpur Industrial Suburb, Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560022


About this item

  • AN ICON REIMAGINED - First introduced in 1999, the Klipsch ProMedia computer speaker system is one of the most praised and best-selling desktop speaker systems of all time. This newly redesigned version is a worthy successor to that honored legacy. From a completely reenvisioned cabinet design to tiltable stands and updated controls, the new Klipsch ProMedia Lumina integrates perfectly with your workstation.
  • BIG BASS, SMALL SPACE - The new Klipsch ProMedia Lumina sound system includes a low-profile subwoofer with all the low-end punch. Features include an adjustable gain knob and cable management design for minimal floor space, maximum impact.
  • INDISPENSABLE DESKTOP DEVICE - Great for gamers, content creators, music and movie lovers – the Klipsch ProMedia Lumina computer speaker system is easy to set up and will provide enjoyment for years to come. Connects via USB-C, AUX, and Bluetooth 5.3 inputs
  • CUSTOMIZE WITH THE KLIPSCH CONTROL APP - Power up your system with the Klipsch Control desktop app. Available on all app stores, Klipsch Control allows precision command over EQ, lighting, and features such as night mode and music react mode. Three color changing options allow further customization of your workspace lighting
